discrepancies.observed: Generic sans-serif font with insufficient weight and incorrect line height.
discrepancies.expected: Modern, slightly rounded bold sans-serif (SF Pro Rounded style).

discrepancies.observed: Flat 2D vector icon for the flower illustration.
discrepancies.expected: 3D glassmorphic rendered illustration with gradients and depth.
discrepancies.fix: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 100%); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);

discrepancies.observed: Horizontal scroller only displays one item and lacks the full row of date capsules.
discrepancies.expected: A full row of date capsules (Sun 12 to Sat 18) with even spacing.
discrepancies.fix: display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: flex-start; overflow-x: scroll;

discrepancies.observed: Solid gray placeholder for the user avatar.
discrepancies.expected: High-resolution photograph with a white border.
discrepancies.fix: background-image: url('avatar_user.png'); background-size: cover; border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;

discrepancies.observed: Avatars in the group are placed side-by-side without overlap.
discrepancies.expected: Avatars should have a negative margin overlap to match the design.

discrepancies.observed: Background color #D1E8E2 appears slightly more saturated in the clone than the muted original.
